title: sideroxylon majus
intro: Sideroxylon majus, also known as the "Gumbo-limbo" tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae. The bark of the Sideroxylon majus tree has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Sideroxylon majus include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Sideroxylon majus are typically made into a tea or a tincture, and are used to treat various ailments, including skin conditions and respiratory issues.
